message:
feat(groupby): wire runtime admission policy observability into groupby operations

Activate the previously unused policy and ledger parameters in
groupby_sum_with_options, groupby_sum_with_trace, and groupby_agg by
calling policy.decide_join_admission() to record admission decisions
for observability without altering groupby output behavior.

Add tests verifying that groupby_sum and groupby_agg each write exactly
one record to the EvidenceLedger under RuntimePolicy::strict().

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
